constitution_prompt: Use the blueprint as the baseline for the project constitution.
plan_prompt: Create a concise execution plan aligned to the blueprint.
checklist_prompt: Generate a pre-implementation checklist for the resulting plan.
implement_prompt: Only implement after all prior stages succeed.
converge_prompt: Converge on the final repository state and summarize open risks.
blueprint_markdown:
# ACME Project Blueprint

## Goal
Build the initial ACME project baseline.
